03 — Facility

Built to
Manufacture

01
3D Printing Zone
FDM and resin printers running in parallel — rapid iteration with professional post-processing.
02
Carbon Fibre & Resin Infusion Zone
Controlled environment for composite layup, vacuum infusion, and forged carbon fibre work.
03
Training & Engineering Space
15-seat DFM and additive manufacturing training space for client teams and students.

India's Manufacturing Backbone
Based in Bengaluru — India's engineering capital. Fast courier nationwide, same-day quotes.
04 — How It Works

Your Project,
Step by Step

STEP 01
File Upload
.STL, .STEP, or .OBJ — or describe your part to us directly
STEP 02
DFM Review
We flag wall thickness, undercuts, and material mismatches before production
STEP 03
Quote Issued
Competitive pricing — same business day, usually within hours
STEP 04
Production
48 hrs for prototypes — 1–3 weeks for injection moulding and composites
STEP 05
QC & Dispatch
Quality inspection, photography, courier dispatch nationwide from Bengaluru
